note: This file contains example assumptions for capacity forecasting. All values are marked source=assumption and do not represent actual Arvectum production data. Replace with measured or derived values before using for procurement decisions.
notes: Calibrated from 18-case R3/XML metadata ingestion cohort. Attachments unavailable, placeholder metadata, hashing embeddings, stub LLM. This is a lower-bound estimate. Not a production capacity guarantee.

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from max(B1, B2) full_backup_archive_to_source_ratio (0.1761, 0.2336). Forecast uses min(1.0, max(B1, B2)) = 0.2336.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p75 (commercial_mvp). p50=832, p75=985, p90=1021 chunks per procurement.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 50 MB database storage per analysis run

commercial_mvp.description: Commercial MVP with moderate procurement volume and automated analysis

documents_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p75 (commercial_mvp). p50=4, p75=4, p90=5 documents per procurement.

embedding_rows_per_chunk.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion: 1 embedding row per chunk (hashing). Production models may generate multiple vectors per chunk.

extracted_text_chars_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p75 (commercial_mvp). p50=112795, p75=138699, p90=155523 characters per procurement.

operational_margin_bytes.note: 20 GiB for Docker images, logs, updates, service files

procurements_per_month.note: Expected monthly procurement volume at commercial MVP stage

temporary_space_peak_factor.note: Temporary peak unavailable (no continuous sampling in R3 metadata ingestion). Template assumption retained. Not calibrated from this measurement run.

vector_bytes_per_component.note: float32 per vector component (4 bytes). Standard for embedding models.

vector_dimension.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion: hashing embeddings (dim=256). Replace with the actual production embedding model dimension.

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from max(B1, B2) full_backup_archive_to_source_ratio (0.1761, 0.2336). Forecast uses min(1.0, max(B1, B2)) = 0.2336.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p50 (pilot). p50=832, p75=985, p90=1021 chunks per procurement.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_procuremen.note: 100 MB database storage for procurement metadata, excluding vectors

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 20 MB database storage per analysis run metadata

pilot.description: Controlled pilot with limited procurements and manual analysis runs

documents_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p50 (pilot). p50=4, p75=4, p90=5 documents per procurement.

embedding_rows_per_chunk.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion: 1 embedding row per chunk (hashing). Production models may generate multiple vectors per chunk.

extracted_text_chars_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p50 (pilot). p50=112795, p75=138699, p90=155523 characters per procurement.

operational_margin_bytes.note: 10 GiB for Docker images, logs, updates, service files

other_artifact_bytes_per_run.note: 50 MB other artifacts per run (logs, intermediate files)

procurements_per_month.note: Expected monthly procurement volume during pilot

raw_document_bytes_per_procurement.note: 500 MB raw documents per procurement (PDF, DOCX, images)

report_artifact_bytes_per_run.note: 10 MB report artifacts per run (DOCX, PDF exports)

temporary_space_peak_factor.note: Temporary peak unavailable (no continuous sampling in R3 metadata ingestion). Template assumption retained. Not calibrated from this measurement run.

vector_bytes_per_component.note: float32 per vector component (4 bytes). Standard for embedding models.

vector_dimension.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion: hashing embeddings (dim=256). Replace with the actual production embedding model dimension.

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from max(B1, B2) full_backup_archive_to_source_ratio (0.1761, 0.2336). Forecast uses min(1.0, max(B1, B2)) = 0.2336.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p90 (scaling). p50=832, p75=985, p90=1021 chunks per procurement.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 100 MB database storage per analysis run

extracted_text_chars_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: p90 (scaling). p50=112795, p75=138699, p90=155523 characters per procurement.
